landing.headline: The stage for Indonesian products.
landing.beat1: Every week, Indonesian developers and founders launch remarkable products — then drown on global platforms that weren't built for us. Wrong timezone, wrong language, wrong audience.
landing.beat2: Produknesia is the stage where Indonesian products launch first: discovered, upvoted, and discussed by their own community.
landing.beat3: We're opening the stage with the first 100+ products. Be the first to know — or be one of the makers on it.
landing.joined: You're on the list! See you on launch day.
landing.alreadyIn: You're already in — see you on launch day.
landing.makerCta: Have a product? Submit it now →
landing.proof: {count} products are getting ready for launch

feed.empty: No products yet. Be the first to launch!

submit.title: Submit a product
submit.signInFirst: Sign in to submit your product.
submit.name: Product name
submit.success: Submitted! Your product is now waiting for review.

validation.nameTooShort: Name must be at least 3 characters.
validation.taglineRequired: Fill in at least one tagline.
validation.imageType: Images must be JPEG, PNG, or WebP.
validation.imageSize: Images must be 4 MB or smaller.
validation.logoSingle: Only one logo file is allowed.
validation.formError: Something went wrong. Check the fields and try again.
validation.updateTitleRequired: Fill in at least one title.
validation.updateBodyRequired: Fill in at least one body.

comments.title: Comments ({count})
comments.empty: No comments yet. Start the discussion!
comments.signInToComment: Sign in to join the discussion.

product.pendingBanner: This product is waiting for review and is only visible to you.

categories.empty: No products in this category yet.

search.title: Search results for "{q}"
search.tooShort: Type at least 2 characters to search.

updates.title: Updates
updates.pairHint: Fill at least one language for the title and the body.
updates.success: Submitted! Your update is waiting for review.

unwatch.done: You will no longer receive updates for this product.
unwatch.invalid: This unsubscribe link is invalid or already used.

invites.title: Invites
invites.created: Invite created — copy the link below.
invites.claimTitle: You're invited to launch on Produknesia
invites.claimIntro: We prepared this listing for you. Sign in, adjust anything you like, and publish it as yours.
invites.claimSignIn: Sign in with Google to claim
invites.deadEnd: This invite link is invalid, expired, or already claimed.
invites.keepLogo: Current logo — it stays unless you choose a new file.
invites.keepScreenshots: Current screenshots — they stay unless you choose new files (new files replace all of them).
